title: MCP tools for FTS5-backed search and function finding
purpose: Provides pseudo_search and pseudo_find_function tools that perform full-text search on project data using FTS5, with optional origin filtering and enrichment of search results.
module_context: Exports SearchOptions interface, SearchHit interface, and two async tool functions: pseudo_search and pseudo_find_function. Both functions initialize a pseudo database handle, perform FTS queries, and enrich results with origin information.

methods.name: pseudo_search
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, query: string, opts?: SearchOptions): Promise<SearchHit[]>

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo database handle for the specified project.
Perform a full-text search on the database using the provided query and limit.
IF no origin filter is specified, enrich the search results with origin information.
ELSE filter the search results by the specified origin and then enrich them with origin information.

methods.name: pseudo_find_function
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, name: string, limit?: number): Promise<SearchHit[]>

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo database handle for the specified project.
Perform a function name search on the database using the provided name and limit.
Enrich the search results with origin information.
Iterate through each search result to fetch origin information from the database.
For each result, query the files table to get the prose origin for the file path.
Construct a new result object with the original data and the fetched origin information.

methods.name: filterByOrigin
methods.normalized_params: (db: any, results: FtsSearchResult[], origin: string): FtsSearchResult[]

steps.content: Iterate through each search result to check if it matches the specified origin.
For each result, query the files table to get the prose origin for the file path.
IF the fetched origin matches the specified origin, include the result in the filtered output.
